stories.headline: Massive mushroom cloud explosion reported in Israel amid Iran tensions

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: We must help liberate the Iranian people, and we can do it. We can do it without our troops on the ground. Without a forever war. We can do it. Train them. Arm them. Support them. And we will never have to worry about nuclear arms from the Iranian regime ever again.

stories.headline: Trump celebrates UN climate committee admitting projections were wrong

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: “GOOD RIDDANCE! After 15 years of Dumocrats promising that “Climate Change” is going to destroy the Planet, the United Nations TOP Climate Committee just admitted that its own projections (RCP8.5) were WRONG! WRONG! WRONG!” - President DONALD J. TRUMP

perspectives.body: $15M for painting the Lincoln Reflecting Pool electric-blue. $100M for a giant Arch named after Trump. $1B for Trump’s ballroom. If this administration is interested in rooting out government waste, they can take a look at Trump's taxpayer-funded vanity projects.

perspectives.body: Help @MassieforKY cross the finish line to victory - donate to his final moneybomb today!

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: A president's trading of securities for his personal account can in no way be argued to constitute activity that falls within the "outer perimeter" of his "official responsibilities." If it is based on inside information used in violation of his fiduciary responsibilities, it is brazenly criminal conduct...

stories.headline: Trump pushes Save America Act for voter ID and citizenship proof

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: THE SAVE AMERICA ACT MUST BE PASSED, NOW... We cannot, as a Country, put up with this any longer!!! Voter I.D., and Proof of Citizenship, must be approved, NOW. - President Donald J. Trump

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: You can redraw districts, but you cannot erase the power of the people. This week, I spoke with @Justinjpearson about our continued fight for voting rights — even in the face of efforts to silence and divide us.

stories.headline: Iran to reopen its stock market Tuesday after 80-day closure
stories.body: BREAKING: Iran announces it will reopen its stock market on Tuesday for the first time since the Iran War began, ending an 80-day closure.

stories.headline: Rising long-term interest rates raise risks of bond crisis and stock adjustments
stories.body: 主要国の長期金利は軒並み急騰。その理由は卸売物価の予想以上の上昇。卸売物価は消費者物価の先行指数なので2021年のようなインフレが再びやってくるかもしれない。そうなると利下げどころか利上げをせざるを得ない。インフレによる債券危機と大幅株価調整のリスクが高まっている。

stories.headline: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin says AI agents automating high-skilled finance jobs
stories.body: NEW: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin says AI agents are now automating “extraordinarily high-skilled” finance jobs.

stories.headline: Reports of X posting restrictions for unverified accounts after daily limits changed.
stories.body:
「Xでポストできなくなった」報告相次ぐ。1日の投稿制限数が変更された影響か
https://news.denfaminicogamer.jp/news/260517b
ヘルプセンターによると「未認証アカウントの1日あたりの通常ポストを50件、リプライを200件に制限」とのこと。端末によってエラーメッセージは異なるが、無課金アカウントなどで確認されている

stories.headline: Senator Bill Cassidy lost his primary in Louisiana, underscoring the durability of President Trump’s grip on the Republican Party.
stories.body: Breaking News: Senator Bill Cassidy lost his primary in Louisiana, underscoring the durability of President Trump’s grip on the Republican Party.

stories.body: BREAKING: Venezuela says it has deported Nicolás Maduro's ally Alex Saab amid ongoing criminal probe in the U.S.

stories.headline: Casting director Nina Gold comments on requirements for next James Bond actor.
stories.body: Casting director Nina Gold says the next James Bond actor must “ooze sex appeal.” She is also looking for someone “young enough to play him in 3, 4 or more pictures.” (Source: Deadline)

stories.headline: James Franco cast in Rambo prequel film
stories.body:
James Franco has been cast in the ‘RAMBO’ prequel film alongside Noah Centineo. 

This is Franco's first major studio movie in years after allegations over sexual misconduct made by 5 women in 2018.

stories.headline: India powered by innovation with unprecedented sector transformation
stories.body: Today’s India is powered by innovation and is witnessing an unprecedented transformation across every sector.

stories.headline: Innovation stems from production as per Palantir CTO on Google paper origins
stories.body:
Google's "Attention is All You Need" paper came from trying to get a 3% gain in Google Translate.

Innovation is a consequence of production. "If you don't make the thing, you cede your opportunity to innovate on the thing."

~ Palantir's CTO @ssankar

stories.headline: New continual learning method called fast-slow training outperforms weights-only training across benchmarks.
stories.body:
babe, wake up.

new continual learning breakthrough just dropped.

fast-slow training (fst) treats model params as "slow" weights and optimized context as "fast weights".

"across math, code, and general reasoning benchmarks, fst beats weights-only training on *every* axis we measured."

stories.headline: Southern California auto shop seeks help finding stolen classic Volkswagen Beetle
stories.body: A local auto restoration business is asking the public for help in tracking down a classic Volkswagen Beetle that was stolen from their property this week.
